title: clinopodium jamesonii
intro: Clinopodium jamesonii, also known as Jameson's calamint, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family that is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Clinopodium jamesonii include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and treating respiratory problems such as bronchitis and coughs. Clinopodium jamesonii can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine to promote overall health and well-being.
